speaker: FOOL
text: Will you make me believe that I am not sent for

speaker: FOOL
text: you?

speaker: SEBASTIAN
text: Go to, go to, thou art a foolish fellow. Let

speaker: SEBASTIAN
text: me be clear of thee.

speaker: FOOL
text: Well held out, i’ faith. No, I do not know you, nor

speaker: FOOL
text: I am not sent to you by my lady to bid you come

speaker: FOOL
text: speak with her, nor your name is not Master

speaker: FOOL
text: Cesario, nor this is not my nose neither. Nothing

speaker: FOOL
text: that is so is so.

speaker: SEBASTIAN
text: I prithee, vent thy folly somewhere else.

speaker: SEBASTIAN
text: Thou know’st not me.

speaker: FOOL
text: Vent my folly? He has heard that word of some

speaker: FOOL
text: great man and now applies it to a Fool. Vent my

speaker: FOOL
text: folly? I am afraid this great lubber the world will

speaker: FOOL
text: prove a cockney. I prithee now, ungird thy strangeness

speaker: FOOL
text: and tell me what I shall vent to my lady. Shall I

speaker: FOOL
text: vent to her that thou art coming?

speaker: SEBASTIAN
text: I prithee, foolish Greek, depart from me.

speaker: SEBASTIAN
text:
There’s money for thee.
                 
                Giving
                 
                money
                .
               If you

speaker: SEBASTIAN
text: tarry longer, I shall give worse payment.

speaker: FOOL
text: By my troth, thou hast an open hand. These wise

speaker: FOOL
text: men that give Fools money get themselves a good

speaker: FOOL
text: report—after fourteen years’ purchase.

speaker: ANDREW
text: Now, sir, have I met you again?

speaker: ANDREW
text: There’s for you.

speaker: SEBASTIAN
text: Why, there’s for thee,

speaker: SEBASTIAN
text: and there, and there.—Are all the people mad?

speaker: TOBY
text: Hold, sir, or I’ll throw your dagger o’er the

speaker: TOBY
text: house.

speaker: FOOL
text: This will I tell my lady straight. I would

speaker: FOOL
text: not be in some of your coats for twopence.

speaker: TOBY
text: Come on, sir, hold!

speaker: ANDREW
text: Nay, let him alone. I’ll go another way to

speaker: ANDREW
text: work with him. I’ll have an action of battery against

speaker: ANDREW
text: him, if there be any law in Illyria. Though I struck

speaker: ANDREW
text: him first, yet it’s no matter for that.

speaker: SEBASTIAN
text: Let go thy hand!

speaker: TOBY
text: Come, sir, I will not let you go. Come, my young

speaker: TOBY
text: soldier, put up your iron. You are well fleshed.

speaker: TOBY
text: Come on.

speaker: SEBASTIAN
text: I will be free from thee.

speaker: SEBASTIAN
text: What wouldst thou now?

speaker: SEBASTIAN
text: If thou dar’st tempt me further, draw thy sword.

speaker: TOBY
text: What, what? Nay, then, I must have an ounce or

speaker: TOBY
text: two of this malapert blood from you.

speaker: OLIVIA
text: Hold, Toby! On thy life I charge thee, hold!

speaker: TOBY
text: Madam.

speaker: OLIVIA
text: Will it be ever thus? Ungracious wretch,

speaker: OLIVIA
text: Fit for the mountains and the barbarous caves,

speaker: OLIVIA
text: Where manners ne’er were preached! Out of my sight!—

speaker: OLIVIA
text: Be not offended, dear Cesario.—

speaker: OLIVIA
text: Rudesby, begone!

speaker: OLIVIA
text: I prithee, gentle friend,

speaker: OLIVIA
text: Let thy fair wisdom, not thy passion, sway

speaker: OLIVIA
text: In this uncivil and unjust extent

speaker: OLIVIA
text: Against thy peace. Go with me to my house,

speaker: OLIVIA
text: And hear thou there how many fruitless pranks

speaker: OLIVIA
text: This ruffian hath botched up, that thou thereby

speaker: OLIVIA
text: Mayst smile at this. Thou shalt not choose but go.

speaker: OLIVIA
text: Do not deny. Beshrew his soul for me!

speaker: OLIVIA
text: He started one poor heart of mine, in thee.

speaker: SEBASTIAN
text: What relish is in this? How runs the stream?

speaker: SEBASTIAN
text: Or I am mad, or else this is a dream.

speaker: SEBASTIAN
text: Let fancy still my sense in Lethe steep;

speaker: SEBASTIAN
text: If it be thus to dream, still let me sleep!

speaker: OLIVIA
text: Nay, come, I prithee. Would thou ’dst be ruled by me!

speaker: SEBASTIAN
text: Madam, I will.

speaker: OLIVIA
text: O, say so, and so be!
